zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Blythe於1465年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓時，她的父親Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire30歲，母親Isabel Jermyn30歲。她於1480年與John Gresham在英國英格蘭諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1523年1月7日在英國諾福爾可霍爾特享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可蕾托 沃爾辛厄姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Blythe于1465年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire30岁，母亲Isabel Jermyn30岁。她于1480年与John Gresham在英国英格兰諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1523年1月7日在英国諾福爾可霍爾特享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可蕾托 沃爾辛厄姆。

nameMeanings.name: Blythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia): from Middle English blithe ‘joyful, happy’ (Old English blīthe ‘gentle, merry’) or from an unrecorded personal name, Old English Blītha, derived from this word.
Scottish: habitational name from Blythe in Lauderdale, Berwickshire, and possibly also from Blyth in Peeblesshire.

English: habitational name from Blyth in Northumberland or Nottinghamshire, or Blythe in Warwickshire, named for the rivers on which they stand. The river name is from Old English blīthe ‘gentle, pleasant’.

variants.name: Bligh
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Blythe , with Anglo-Norman loss of th.
Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Ó Blighe ‘descendant of Blighe’, probably a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse byname Blígr (from blígja ‘to gaze’).
Cornish: nickname from Cornish blyth ‘wolf’. Compare Blethen .

variants.name: Blyth
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Blythe  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Blythe was born in 1465, in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire, was 30 and her mother, Isabel Jermyn, was 30. She married John Gresham in 1480, in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 January 1523, in Holt, Norfolk, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Blythe est née en 1465, à Long Stratton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel Jermyn, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Gresham en 1480, à Long Stratton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1523, à Holt, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Walsingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Blythe 1465 in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire 30 und ihre Mutter Isabel Jermyn 30. Sie hat 1480 in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom John Gresham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1523 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Holt, Norfolk, England und wurde in Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Blythe è nata il nel 1465 nel Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Isabel Jermyn, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John Gresham nel 1480, nel Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 gennaio 1523, nel Holt, Norfolk, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Little Walsingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Blytheが1465年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquireは30歳，母Isabel Jermynは30歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオンでJohn Greshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1523年1月7日にイギリスノーフォルクホルトで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクリットル ワルシンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Blythe(이)가 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Jermyn(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴에서 John Gresham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 1월 7일 영국 노르폴크 홀트에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리틀 월징함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Blythe nasceu em 1465, em Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Jermyn, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Gresham em 1480, em Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1523, em Holt, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Little Walsingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Blythe родилась в 1465 г. в местности лонг страттон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Jermyn, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gresham в 1480 г. в местности лонг страттон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 января 1523 г. в местности холт, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности литл валсингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Blythe nació en 1465, en Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander Blythe, II II, Esquire, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabel Jermyn, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John Gresham en 1480, en Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de enero de 1523, en Holt, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Little Walsingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
